---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new shadcn/ui component to be ported
title: "[Component] Rn{Name}"
labels: component-request, help-wanted
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name

`Rn{Name}`

## shadcn/ui Reference

Link to the original shadcn/ui component: https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/{name}

## Use Case

Why do you need this component? Describe your use case.

## Priority

- [ ] Critical — blocking my project
- [ ] High — important for my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — future consideration

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this component
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing/review
- [ ] No, just requesting

## Additional Context

Any specific requirements, variants, or behaviors you need.
